purpose: Canonical MetaBlooms trace/span event record schema for boot, governed stages, validators, receipts, handoffs, exports, and blockers.

alignment.opentelemetry: Event names identify event structure; attributes carry contextual detail; trace/span fields model operation causality.
alignment.w3c_trace_context: trace_id/span_id/parent_span_id provide vendor-neutral trace identity concepts inside the artifact runtime.
alignment.slsa_provenance: input_materials and output_artifacts bind where, when, and how artifacts were produced.

fail_closed_rules: Every JSONL row must parse as JSON.
Every row must include canonical fields and schema_version MB_TRACE_SPAN_EVENT.v1.
Every ERROR or BLOCKED row must include attributes.error, attributes.blocker, or attributes.reason.
Every non-null parent_span_id must reference an existing span_id in the same ledger.
Derivative index and causal graph must be regenerated from the raw ledger, not hand-authored summaries.
